name: caMRSA
description: This test case evaluates the identification of community-associated MRSA (caMRSA) cases using a complex phenotype algorithm that combines culture results, diagnostic codes, and clinical criteria. The phenotype requires distinguishing community-associated from healthcare-associated MRSA based on timing, setting, and associated conditions like skin and soft tissue infections.
prompt: Find patients with community-associated MRSA infections, including those with culture-confirmed methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus from outpatient settings or diagnosed within 72 hours of hospital admission, particularly focusing on skin and soft tissue infections.

required_codes.display: Methicillin resistant Staphylococcus aureus in conditions classified elsewhere and of unspecified site
Methicillin resistant pneumonia due to Staphylococcus aureus
Carrier or suspected carrier of Methicillin resistant Staphylococcus aureus
Personal history of Methicillin resistant Staphylococcus aureus
Infection with microorganisms resistant to penicillins
